name: Priya Sharma
quote: Saurabh is thoughtful with the details that make interfaces feel refined. He brings design sensitivity and engineering discipline together.

name: Arjun Mehta
quote: He consistently ships polished UI, asks strong product questions, and improves code quality without adding complexity.

name: Neha Verma
quote: What stood out most was how quickly he turned rough ideas into confident, professional experiences that felt ready for users.
